item.title: First morning in 6 months at the south pole
item.dc:creator: Boxzsak

item.title: Why student debt exists.
item.description:
My brother is waiting to see what happens to his student loan debt. He's really sweating it; even if only $10K was forgiven, it would lighten his load.
I admit that this is nearly a year old, but it still seems relevant to me.
(originally posted by @UncleMartha in r/NewsWithJingjing on 2023-06-29 10:59:07)

item.title: Really sweet story! It's the little things in life!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Day 6 of Making BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon Hello everyone! I am back with updates on this project today we are styling Shadowheart's wig (Selune version) and finishing the dress details :D Thank you for following this series, it's almost done as Day 7 was the last one during which I painted the props I made :) Your support on my last post talking about struggles as a cosplayer really warmed my heart and I'm really grateful the comment section was so overwhelmingly positive and supportive. I actually already shot this cosplay in the forest and river, pictures will be posted this weekend on https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon if you're interested to see them stay tuned :D Have a great day all! Stay awesome :)
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
obvs they dont mean this month. or do they? greetings online friends
actual useful red circle/arrows are rare
wonder what happens when you press yes
i'm ok with this
unhinged
freaky shit
i guess
haven't been to a chili's in decades
evidently
ok
meats
mmm hmm
yes
garlic bread = good
they should have advanced petting zoos with more interesting animals
do they do that?
that's disturbing
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Sketchies
item.description: JUMP SCARE Disclaimer here’s how I look usually. and as of writing this I am staring down at my iPad with a double chin. I don’t look that nice irl bc I have awful posture and a million yard stare and unfortunately the camera blur doesn’t translate to real life just wanted to be real because these are like 2 nice posed pics of me as opposed to many many unflattering ones. Anyway hope u like the art Extra https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa Dono and commissions: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: the babies I was born with
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Meme dump to get you trough Friday #249 (hang in there, weekend is coming soon)
item.description:
1. Cleva girl
2. Apparently in this sport you can kick start fighting whenever you want
3. What magic is this
4
5. Do not be like these people
6
7
8. We ve been tricked
9
10. That was the coolest thing ever
11
12
13
14
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. Here is an inspiration quote within the game! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a happy weekend, gang!

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1257 (panic at the other places)
item.description:
It's a morning! I'm alive! My dinosaur and I will become problems to the rest of the world. Let us take this bread by force.
Oh, the Pyle guide to birds. As incomprehensible as the OT and the Silmarillion.
They're about to explode into the music scene.
Just. Uh. Not future reference at ALL. Nope.
My favorite sort of dates.
Barbarism isn't exclusive to barbarians.
Fucking furniture.
It really is.
I like my women like I like my art: Neolithicc.
Ngl, I want this.
I remember wondering why my hummingbird feeders were going empty at night when I lived in Bisbee. Then one night I stayed outside and BATS EVERYWHERE and I never felt more goth. I mean, I was feeding wild bats and living inside a building there was an old brothel. What more Old Western Vampire lair is there?
I bet one of these was @SecretHarpy. I'm not mad, just disappointed I wasn't invited.
I remember when I accidentally taught my 6 year old Goddaughter to say "existential dread." The bishop asked how she was doing, she said "existential dead," the bishop totally lost it with hysterical laughter
None of them ever panned out, the fucking lazy old god bastards.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [EXISTENTIAL LOUD CONURE SCREAMING]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Images of Note: Insufficently Woomba
item.description:
aaaaaaaaaaa
fucker's having the time of their life
owo
Gaben
ever had this experience, I did
oh no
Most people think of Punks as smashhappy anarchists but they mostly target people who are being cunts to others and that's fucking baller
Question is....why?
Transport for Edinburgh pls answer my email about putting owo faces on the trams.
You know the Barbie TV shows? I want a Barbie TV show that is well made about Barbie and her friends and their struggles and I wanna have Barbie working as a software engineer.
I remember when Gnome was better than KDE now Gnome is terrible and I'm a KDE fangirl.
:) This give off the energy of my cat wearing a collar
That's it, that's Bert and Ernie. Then with other TV couples you have Two Berts (Holt and Kevin) and two Ernies (Mitch and Cam).
The Reform Manifesto is the third worst manifesto I have read this election, the first was an independent running on "defining sex" and the second was from a network of independents who on their leaflet talked about "localism" a lot then when you looked at their manifesto wanted to stop 5G towers and get rid of LTNs (which are primarily school zones and anti-rat-running measures here) and Net zero targets.
That's fucking amazing. Sometimes it amazes me that that crows in my area are as smart as primary school kids.
Elon Musk is fucking up so bad he can't even coup right anymore.
t h e y
Oh my God it actually happened and I looked it up.
I ship it
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Seagull bits off more than it can chew
item.dc:creator: AccidentalSharting

item.title: Just an update on my other posts! Check those breasts folks, and that includes guys as well!
item.description: It's going to be hard for me not to know what's a fibroid or isn't when I feel lumps that don't change, but I'll cross that bridge when I come to it! Honestly keep checking your breasts, men take note...there were men in the clinic too waiting on results, it happens to you too so please check regularly! For everyone going through it, for those waiting on results or waiting to get seen after finding a lump remember it's not always cancer. The doctors, nurses and technicians are amazing and will talk you through everything. Lean on those around you, talk about your fears and have a plan but don't panic. Always, always get checked, get any changes looked at! I've been told what to look out for and have to go back in 6months to make sure there's no changes, and go in sooner if I notice anything. But everything has been made clear to me! Thank you Imgur for being amazing and supportive! I just thought after the other posts I'd give an update!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: AuDHD memes and such
item.description:
Got all the fun diagnoses in my 30s
.
I try though?
Me in therapy still trying to get at the core issues, years later
One good thing about my divorce: I don't have to tone myself down for him/his friends anymore :)
^actual photo of me
.
:)
I had a 15-minute interaction with a stranger and tried to seem "normal" (or otherwise not weird/anxious). When the conversation ended, I felt completely depleted. I know it's better/easier/less exhausting if I just... be myself. But rejection is exponentially worse than burnout, so... :D
:D:D
.
Acceptance is key?
yes
I touch.
I know we're against selfies here, sorry :P
kitty
lol
friends?
.
.
This spring, I started putting some of my photography onto journals and selling them on Etsy.
My cat comforts me daily. I try to comfort her too. She's old and has a hard time walking now. I have ramps and step-stools around the apartment. And I keep a soft jacket next to my chair, so that whenever she wants up on my lap, she can enjoy some biscuit-worthy snuggles. I love her.
Also cats.
yes
You make. I buy.
Weee!
but why
.
:D
but seriously, i did not consent to you touching me so please accept this light tazing in response
hypervigilance is the best x_X
It just amazes me that some people can both come up with an idea *and* execute the idea to completion. How are you both creative *and* effective like that? :P
.
.
early 2000s flashback, anyone? Anyway, have a nice day, imgurians :)

item.title: Shelter dogs are the best dogs.
item.description:
The other dog in the kennel next to him is Macy. She has been adopted next day later.
Now, it is my turn - Macy the pup probably :D Source : https://instagram.com/adoptingd0gs
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter
